calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jonathan Vaknin, Esq., of Vaknin law firm Tel:510.480.1430 for Judgment creditor/plaintiff.
Megan Lees Self Represented defendant (in person appearance).

A hearing is required. The matter was heard and discussed. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION: future withholding per pay period (wage garnishment) shall be $100.00 until the debt is satisfied or further court order, whichever is first. The order shall be effective upon issuance.

Order is Signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
